summary: Mittari.fi Phase 1.5 (Revised) — architectural restructure verified end-to-end. Backend pytest 10/10 still green (no API changes). Frontend: split hero on desktop (DialCockpit left + HeroCapture right with vertical divider) verified at 1440x900; hero email input is exactly 64px tall; brand-blue 'Tilaa Mittari-ilmoitukset →' submit shows 'OLET LISTALLA. MITTARI HOITAA LOPUT.' confirmation; LiveTilesGrid section renders 6 live tiles (follow-btn-jarttu84 et al.); FollowModal flow works end-to-end with auto-close after 2s showing 'Olet listalla. Ilmoitamme heti kun Jarttu84 menee liveen.'; MISSASIT EILEN section present with Korpisoturi + Slotsband cards; mid-page Bell capture confirmed REMOVED (mid_page_capture_check=none); PersistentCapture desktop right-rail appears correctly on /striimaajat, /menetelma, /viikon-kortti, /peli, /kasinot and is absent on /, /aloita, /landing, /kasinot/weezybet; PersistentCapture mobile bottom-sheet collapsed→expand→form→collapse cycle works; StateContextualFloat 'MITTARI KUUMA · 3 viikon parasta tarjousta nyt voimassa →' shows + close button dismisses; UTMBanner triggers with ?utm_campaign=KESA2026 showing 'Tulit "KESA2026" -uutiskirjeestä…' + close works; ThemeContext dark default at 16:00+ Helsinki + localStorage 'mittari-theme' override verified (html class='dark'); OperatorReview compressed on /kasinot/weezybet — show-deeper-toggle present, deeper-{quickfacts,proscons,activity,faq} all absent from DOM until toggle clicked, then all 4 appear; bottom #cta + related operators still render; mobile stacking confirmed (hero-capture y > dial-cockpit y); lang/theme toggles desktop+mobile all present.

issues: Console logs 3x 'SVG attribute height: Expected length, "auto"' warnings. Non-blocking but worth fixing — likely an inline SVG with height='auto' (probably in dial bezel or one of the lucide icons being styled with CSS height:auto).

verified_features.split_hero_desktop: PASS — grid grid-cols-[1.15fr_auto_0.85fr], DialCockpit left, HeroCapture right, vertical divider (aria-hidden middle col) present
verified_features.hero_capture_submit_flow: PASS — submitting email shows OLET LISTALLA. MITTARI HOITAA LOPUT. confirmation panel; FI micro-lines PÄIVITTÄIN · 1 SÄHKÖPOSTI / 0 SPÄMMIÄ · 0 EHTOA / 4 283 SUOMALAISTA TILAA all render; 3 channel icons present
verified_features.live_tiles_grid: PASS — live-tiles-section present, follow-btn-jarttu84 etc. selectors render with bell+plus glyph
verified_features.follow_modal_flow: PASS — opens on tile follow click, follow-email-input + follow-submit work, success state 'Olet listalla.' + auto-close after 2s confirmed
verified_features.missasit_eilen: PASS — eyebrow MISSASIT EILEN · 24 H present, both Korpisoturi + Slotsband MomentCards render
verified_features.mid_page_capture_removed: PASS — no Bell/Tilaa Mittari section between live tiles and Missasit Eilen (mid_page_capture_check returned 'none')
verified_features.persistent_capture_route_logic: PASS — visible on /striimaajat, /menetelma, /viikon-kortti, /peli, /kasinot; absent on /, /aloita, /landing, /kasinot/weezybet (operator review)
verified_features.persistent_capture_mobile_bottom_sheet: PASS — starts collapsed with chevron, expand reveals form (input+submit+3 icons), collapse button returns to collapsed
verified_features.persistent_capture_desktop_rail: PASS — fixed right:24 top:120, mini headline + form + 3 channel icons
verified_features.state_contextual_float: PASS — bottom-right desktop / bottom-left mobile, label 'MITTARI KUUMA', body '3 viikon parasta tarjousta nyt voimassa →', state-float-close dismisses
verified_features.utm_banner: PASS — only renders when ?utm_campaign present; content 'Tulit "KESA2026" -uutiskirjeestä. Seuraa suosikkistriimaajaasi alta — anna sähköposti, hoidamme loput.'; close button dismisses
verified_features.dark_mode_default_helsinki: PASS — html.className='dark' after reload; localStorage 'mittari-theme' read+write works
verified_features.operator_review_compression: PASS — show-deeper-toggle present; deeper-quickfacts, deeper-proscons, deeper-activity, deeper-faq all hidden initially; clicking toggle reveals all four; live data strip (NYKYINEN JACKPOT €284 102, UUSIA PELAAJIA 47, KOTIUTUS MEDIAANI 1h 38min, STRIIMIT NYT 3) appears under trust signal row; #cta + related still render
verified_features.mobile_hero_stack: PASS — hero-capture.y > dial-cockpit.y on 390x844 viewport, no divider visible
verified_features.phase15_visuals_preserved: PASS — ticker, marquee, atmospheric glow, scanlines, dial V2 with bezel/ticks/needle, KUUMA active arc, MomentCard data panels all rendering as in iteration_2

action_items: Investigate console SVG warning: 'Error: <svg> attribute height: Expected length, "auto"' fires 3x on every page load. Likely an SVG using height='auto' as attribute rather than CSS — invalid for SVG attribute (must be a CSS rule or numeric). Non-blocking but pollutes console.
index.html title still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' and meta description 'A product of emergent.sh' — leftover from boilerplate, not Mittari-branded (carried from iteration_2; still unfixed).
critical_code_review_comments: PersistentCapture skip-list is hard-coded in component ('/aloita', '/landing', '/'). Operator review uses regex /^\/kasinot\/[^/]+$/ — fine but worth promoting to a shared route-meta map if more pages need exclusion.

Hero capture, persistent capture, and follow modal all only console.log emails. Acknowledged as Phase 2 work, but adding a single backend endpoint POST /api/notify-signup (or reusing existing /api/signup) would already be a low-effort win.
StateContextualFloat reads CURRENT_DIAL directly from mock; if dial state polling is added later this won't reactively update. Wrap in dial state hook in Phase 2.

UTMBanner reads window.location.search once on mount — does not react to client-side route changes that change the query. Acceptable since UTM is captured on first arrival; document this in code comment.
OperatorReview deeper-toggle uses useState only — no URL hash/scroll-to-anchor when expanded. Adding scrollIntoView on the revealed section would improve UX.
Theme default uses hours >= 16 OR < 7 for dark (16:00–07:00). Brief says 16:00+ — matches. Good.
Dial state on home is single-source from CURRENT_DIAL — fine for now; once dial poll is added, ensure StateContextualFloat + Home read the same source (or a shared context).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on Phase 1.5 (Revised) surface area — split hero, LiveTiles, FollowModal, MissasitEilen, PersistentCapture (desktop+mobile), StateContextualFloat, UTMBanner, ThemeContext dark default, OperatorReview compression with show-deeper toggle all verified

seed_data_creation: pytest re-inserted TEST_minimal@, TEST_full@, TEST_pred@ signups + 3 prediction docs (carry-over from iteration_2). Frontend captures only console.log (mocked per spec).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1.5 (Revised) is now ARCHITECTURALLY stable. Key new testids: utm-banner / utm-banner-close, hero-capture / hero-capture-input / hero-capture-submit / hero-capture-headline, live-tiles-section, live-tile-{slug}, follow-btn-{slug}, follow-modal / follow-email-input / follow-submit, persistent-capture-desktop / persistent-capture-mobile / persistent-capture-expand / persistent-capture-collapse / persistent-capture-input / persistent-capture-submit / persistent-capture-form, state-contextual-float / state-float-close, show-deeper-toggle / deeper-quickfacts / deeper-proscons / deeper-activity / deeper-faq. PersistentCapture skip routes: '/', '/aloita', '/landing', and regex /^\/kasinot\/[^/]+$/. For UTM testing visit /?utm_campaign=KESA2026. Theme localStorage key 'mittari-theme'. Mock email submissions log to console only — Phase 2 work to wire to backend. CURRENT_DIAL = KUUMA still, so StateContextualFloat points to /kasinot.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no blocking issues found. One non-blocking console SVG warning + boilerplate index.html title carryover.
